subcodes.first_line: O Branch! The Greater Branch was present before the Wronged One and presented thy letter, which was honored to attain His hearing. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ع ط غصن اکبر لدی المظلوم حاضر نامه شما را عرض نمود و بشرف اصغا فائز گشت لله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
